texto: If a string is in a knot,Patience will untie it.Patience can do many things—Did you ever try it?If it was sold at any shopI should like to buy it.But you and I must find our own—No other can supply it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anna M. Pratt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “If a string is in a knot,Patience will untie it.Patience can do many things—Did you ever try it?I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, patience, string pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
